name: the-code-of-the-extraordinary-mind
description: Vishen Lakhiani's The Code of the Extraordinary Mind — a personal transformation and consciousness engineering toolkit teaching you to question society's 'Brules,' rewrite your models of reality, and bend reality through blissipline, six-phase meditation, and vision-driven goals.
useCase: Learn to question society's programming, consciously choose your beliefs, and live an extraordinary life on your own terms.
knownRisks: The book's anti-establishment tone may feel dismissive of traditional paths that work well for many people
The 'bending reality' concepts can feel overly mystical for practical-minded readers
Mindvalley is a commercial entity — some content is designed to drive product sales
